sources.notes: Official IMO earthquake catalog API (api.vedur.is/quakes). Returns GeoJSON FeatureCollection of events between start_time/end_time (ISO8601). Iceland is highly seismically active; this is the authoritative national feed. Use a rolling 24-48h window.

IMO CAP (Common Alerting Protocol) broker. Returns all active CAP warnings (weather, volcanic, flood, earthquake) as JSON. Empty/204 when no active alerts. Authoritative national multi-hazard warning feed.
Meteoalarm pan-European weather-warning feed for Iceland. Atom format; CC BY 4.0. Useful cross-check against the native IMO CAP feed.

IMO automatic weather-station (AWS) observations API. Latest hourly basic parameters (temperature, wind, pressure) across the national station network, including Road Administration and Landsvirkjun stations.
Regional avalanche forecasts for five Icelandic areas (issued daily 1 Jan–1 Jun, 3x/week off-season). Official IMO avalanche bulletin site; authoritative national avalanche hazard source.

Iceland's electricity transmission-system operator. Publishes grid status, outages and system information via the corporate portal; underlying API (api.landsnet.is) requires validation before direct use.
Icelandic Environment Agency portal covering air quality, pollution and environmental monitoring. National air-quality readings are published via the Environment Agency and European AQ index.

sources.authority: Icelandic Meteorological Office (Veðurstofa Íslands) — Volcanoes API
sources.notes: IMO Volcanoes API. Returns 34 Icelandic volcanoes with names, codes, locations and basic metadata. OpenAPI spec at /volcanoes/openapi.json confirmed CC BY 4.0 license. Verified 200 application/json.

sources.authority: Icelandic Meteorological Office (Veðurstofa Íslands) — Volcano Alert Level System
sources.notes: IMO Volcano Alert Level System (VALS). Returns current alert level for each monitored Icelandic volcano system. CC BY 4.0 per OpenAPI spec. Verified 200 application/json (36 entries).

sources.authority: Icelandic Meteorological Office (Veðurstofa Íslands) — Volcano Observatory Notice to Aviation
sources.notes: IMO Volcano Observatory Notice to Aviation (VONA) notifications. Standardised ash/eruption alerts for aviation. CC BY 4.0 per OpenAPI spec. Verified 200 application/json (208 entries).

sources.authority: Vegagerðin (Icelandic Road and Coastal Administration) — WFS
sources.notes: Vegagerðin OGC WFS providing road conditions, weather station data, road cameras, bridge/tunnel data, and winter road surface layers (roadconditions_arealocation, roadconditions_lineincident, roadconditions_pointincident, faerdpunktar, faerdferlar). Open Government Licence based on UK OGL. Verified 200 application/xml.

sources.authority: GDACS — Global Disaster Alert and Coordination System (EC JRC)
sources.notes: GDACS multi-hazard event list (earthquake, hurricane, flood). Global feed; filter by country client-side. Confirmed HTTP 200, content-type application/json; charset=utf-8.
